workflow.name: Screen and score resumes from Gmail with PDF parsing, HubSpot, Slack and PostgreSQL
workflow.description:
# Talent Sovereign: AI-Powered Resume Screener & Recruitment Hub

## 🎯 Description
This is an elite enterprise-grade solution for **Talent Acquisition** and **HR Ops** teams. It automates the high-volume task of resume screening by transforming unstructured PDF applications into structured candidate profiles. Leveraging an advanced **PDF-to-JSON** parsing engine and a multi-factor scoring algorithm, it ensures only the highest-quality candidates reach your CRM while maintaining a professional feedback loop for all applicants.



### ✨ The Sovereign Lifecycle
1. **Intelligent Intake & Validation** - Monitors **Gmail** for new submissions. A pre-validation layer ensures only healthy PDF binaries under 10MB enter the stream, filtering out noise and irrelevant attachments.
2. **Atomic Data Extraction** - Utilizes the **HTML to PDF (Parse PDF to JSON)** node to decompose resumes into structured text data.
3. **Advanced AI Resume Parser** - A sophisticated Code Node acts as a virtual Recruiter. It extracts contact info, LinkedIn URLs, and maps 45+ specific skills across 7 categories (Programming, Cloud, Data, etc.). It even calculates "Total Years of Experience" by analyzing date ranges within the text.
4. **Multi-Factor Scoring & Tiering** - Candidates are automatically ranked on a 100-point scale:
    - **A+ Tier (90+):** Exceptional talent; priority alerts.
    - **Qualified (70+):** Standard qualified candidates.
    - **Below Threshold:** Automatically prepared for the rejection track.
5. **Smart Routing Matrix** - 
    - **Green Track:** Qualified leads are created in **HubSpot CRM**, archived in a "Qualified" **Google Drive** folder, and announced via **Slack**.
    - **Red Track:** Unqualified candidates receive a personalized **Gmail** rejection including constructive feedback on skills they could improve.
6. **Closed-Loop Analytics** - Logs every data point to **PostgreSQL**, calculating funnel metrics such as skill-match percentages and processing latency for continuous hiring strategy optimization.

### 💡 Key Technical Features
- **Heuristic Skill Detection:** Uses NLP pattern matching to identify technical competencies even if they are phrased differently.
- **Personalized Rejection Engine:** Automatically suggests specific skill areas (e.g., Cloud or Certifications) for candidates to work on based on what was missing from their resume.
- **Forensic Archival:** Maintains a clean, searchable archive of all applicants in a hierarchical cloud structure.

### 🚀 Benefits
✅ **90% Faster Screening** - Moves from manual reading to high-level candidate oversight instantly.
✅ **Professional Employer Brand** - Ensures every applicant receives a timely, personalized response.
✅ **Data-Driven Hiring** - Track exactly which sources and skill sets are performing best in your funnel.

---
**Tags:** #recruitment #hr-tech #resume-parser #ai #hubspot #automation #pdf-to-json

**Category:** Human Resources | **Difficulty:** Advanced

parameters.content:
## 📧 PHASE 1: Intelligent Intake & Validation
Monitors Gmail for resume submissions. Validates PDF attachments and extracts raw text content for AI processing. Handles multiple attachment formats and sizes.

## 🧠 PHASE 2: AI-Powered Resume Analysis
Extracts structured data: contact info, skills, experience, education. Uses NLP pattern matching and scoring algorithms to calculate qualification metrics. Assigns candidate tier (A/B/C/D).

## 🎯 PHASE 3: Smart Routing & Integration
Qualified candidates (70+ score) → HubSpot CRM + Slack alert + Drive archive. Unqualified candidates → Automated rejection email with personalized feedback. All actions logged to analytics.

## 📊 PHASE 4: Analytics & Feedback Loop
Tracks hiring funnel metrics, candidate quality trends, and time-to-hire. Feeds data back to scoring model for continuous improvement.

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO candidate_applications (
  email,
  name,
  phone,
  linkedin,
  location,
  skills,
  years_experience,
  highest_degree,
  university,
  certifications,
  qualification_score,
  tier,
  qualified,
  received_date,
  processed_date
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.candidateEmail }}',
  '{{ $json.candidateName }}',
  '{{ $json.candidatePhone }}',
  '{{ $json.candidateLinkedIn }}',
  '{{ $json.candidateLocation }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.skills) }}',
  {{ $json.yearsExperience }},
  '{{ $json.highestDegree }}',
  '{{ $json.university }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.certifications) }}',
  {{ $json.qualificationScore }},
  '{{ $json.tier }}',
  {{ $json.qualified }},
  '{{ $json.receivedDate }}',
  NOW()
) RETURNING id;

parameters.message:
=

Thank You for Your Application

Dear {{ $json.candidateName.split(' ')[0] }},

Thank you for your interest in joining our team. We have carefully reviewed your application and resume.

Application Assessment:
Qualification Score: {{ $json.qualificationScore }}/100 (Tier {{ $json.tier }})
Experience: {{ $json.yearsExperience }} years
Education: {{ $json.highestDegree }}

After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose qualifications more closely match our current requirements at this time.

Feedback for your professional development:

  • Your application showed {{ $json.totalSkills }} relevant skills
  • Consider gaining more experience in: {{ $json.skillsByCategory.cloud.length === 0 ? 'Cloud technologies (AWS, Azure)' : 'Advanced frameworks' }}
  • {{ $json.certifications.length === 0 ? 'Professional certifications could strengthen your profile' : 'Your certifications are a strong asset' }}

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may better align with your qualifications. We will keep your resume on file for 6 months.

We wish you the best of luck in your job search and future career endeavors.

Best regards,
HR Team

This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.

Follow us on LinkedIn for future opportunities!
parameters.subject: =Thank you for your application - {{ $json.candidateName }}

parameters.text:
=❌ *Application Rejected*

*Name:* {{ $json.candidateName }}
*Email:* {{ $json.candidateEmail }}
*Score:* {{ $json.qualificationScore }}/100 (Tier {{ $json.tier }})
*Experience:* {{ $json.yearsExperience }} years
*Skills:* {{ $json.totalSkills }} identified

*Reason:* Score below 70 threshold
*Action:* Rejection email sent. Resume archived.

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO hiring_funnel_analytics (
  outcome,
  qualification_score,
  tier,
  years_experience,
  experience_level,
  total_skills,
  skill_match_percentage,
  highest_degree,
  has_certifications,
  has_linkedin,
  processing_time_seconds,
  received_date,
  processed_date
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.analytics.outcome }}',
  {{ $json.qualificationScore }},
  '{{ $json.tier }}',
  {{ $json.yearsExperience }},
  '{{ $json.analytics.experienceLevel }}',
  {{ $json.totalSkills }},
  {{ $json.analytics.skillMatchPercentage }},
  '{{ $json.highestDegree }}',
  {{ $json.analytics.hasCertifications }},
  {{ $json.analytics.hasLinkedIn }},
  {{ $json.analytics.processingTimeSeconds }},
  '{{ $json.receivedDate }}',
  '{{ $json.analysisTimestamp }}'
);

parameters.content:
## ⚖️ Talent Sovereign: AI Resume Intelligence Hub

Industrial-grade recruitment pipeline: Gmail Intake → AI Parsing → Scoring → Smart Routing.

### ⚙️ Core Sovereign Logic
* **PHASE 1: Intake & Validation:** Monitors Gmail for PDF resumes; validates file integrity and metadata.
* **PHASE 2: AI Parsing:** Uses **Parse PDF to JSON** to extract skills, experience, and contact data.
* **PHASE 3: Tiered Scoring:** Custom algorithm calculates a 100-pt score and assigns Tiers (A+ to D).
* **PHASE 4: Smart Routing:** - **Qualified (70+):** Syncs to HubSpot CRM, archives to 'Qualified' Drive, and alerts Slack.
    - **Rejected (<70):** Sends personalized feedback email and archives to 'Rejected' Drive.
* **PHASE 5: Analytics:** Logs funnel metrics (time-to-hire, skill trends) to PostgreSQL.

### 📋 Setup
1. **Drive:** Create 'Qualified' and 'Rejected' folders.
2. **CRM:** Connect HubSpot App Token.
3. **DB:** Prepare `candidate_applications` table in Postgres.

**Metrics:** `Qualification_Score`, `Skill_Match_%`, `Funnel_Conversion`.

user.name: Jitesh Dugar
user.bio: AI Automation Specialist - OpenAI, CRM & Automation Expert with a solid understanding of various tools that include Zapier, Make, Zoho CRM, Hubspot, Google Sheets, Airtable, Pipedrive, Google Analytics, and more.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
